info.title: py-iku Studio API
info.description: FastAPI wrapper around py2dataiku for py-iku Studio

get.description: Return service status, API version, and the underlying py2dataiku version.

post.summary: Convert Python code to a Dataiku flow (synchronous)
post.description:
Convert Python code to a DataikuFlow.

- **mode=rule** (default): AST-based, offline, fast.
- **mode=llm**: LLM-assisted, requires `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` or `OPENAI_API_KEY`
  set in the server environment. Max 30-second wall-clock timeout.

Errors in the py2dataiku hierarchy are mapped to RFC 7807 problem+json.

get.description:
Return catalog entries for all 37 RecipeType values.

Response is cached for 60 seconds (public, max-age=60).

schema.title: Response Get Recipes Catalog Recipes Get

get.description:
Return catalog entries for Prepare processors (up to 122).

Optional filters: `q` (name/description substring) and `category` (exact match).
Response is cached for 60 seconds.

parameters.name: q

schema.description: Filter by name or description substring
schema.title: Q

parameters.description: Filter by name or description substring

schema.title: Response Get Processors Catalog Processors Get

get.summary: Get a single processor catalog entry by type
get.description:
Return the catalog entry for a single processor type.

`processor_type` should be the DSS canonical name (e.g. `ColumnRenamer`).
Returns 404 if the type is not in the catalog.

post.summary: Compute the per-node diff between two flows
post.description:
Compare two flows by recipe name (the node id) and return added/removed/changed.

- **added**: recipe present in B but not in A.
- **removed**: recipe present in A but not in B.
- **changed**: recipe present in both with a different ``type`` or
  different settings/steps.

post.summary: Compute a complexity score for a flow
post.description:
Compute the complexity score from a flow payload.

The flow is hydrated into a real ``DataikuFlow`` via ``from_dict`` so
the FlowGraph metrics computed by ``score_flow`` are accurate.

post.summary: Export a DataikuFlow as a binary payload
post.description: Render the flow as ``format`` and stream it back as an attachment.

200.description: Binary export payload (zip / json / yaml / svg / png / pdf)

422.description: Invalid format or malformed flow body

501.description: Format not supported in this environment

processor_count.title: Processor Count
processor_count.description: Total prepare steps across all PREPARE recipes

max_depth.title: Max Depth
max_depth.description: Longest path from root to leaf (node hops)

fan_out_max.title: Fan Out Max
fan_out_max.description: Maximum out-degree of any single node

cost_estimate.title: Cost Estimate
cost_estimate.description: Estimated LLM cost in USD (LLM mode only)

ComplexityScore.title: ComplexityScore
ComplexityScore.description: Flow complexity metrics derived from FlowGraph analysis.

ConvertMode.title: ConvertMode
ConvertMode.description: Conversion mode: rule-based AST or LLM-assisted.

max_code_size_bytes.title: Max Code Size Bytes
max_code_size_bytes.description: Maximum allowed code size in bytes

DataikuFlowModel.title: DataikuFlowModel
DataikuFlowModel.description:
Mirrors DataikuFlow.to_dict() shape exactly.

Validates that all recipe inputs/outputs reference datasets that exist
in the datasets list.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Composed recipe settings (discriminated union over 12 subclasses). Not populated by py-iku to_dict(); present here to expose the full settings schema contract in /openapi.json.

DataikuRecipeModel.title: DataikuRecipeModel
DataikuRecipeModel.description:
Mirrors DataikuRecipe.to_dict() shape.

py-iku's to_dict() inlines recipe-type-specific settings via to_display_dict()
rather than nesting them under a 'settings' key. Those fields pass through via
`extra="allow"`.

The `settings` field is declared here as Optional so all 12 RecipeSettings
subclass schemas are registered in the OpenAPI component registry. In practice
it will be None for flows produced by py-iku's to_dict(), but callers that
construct recipes directly may populate it.

DatasetConnectionTypeEnum.title: DatasetConnectionTypeEnum
DatasetConnectionTypeEnum.description: Dataset connection types — mirrors DatasetConnectionType enum values.

DatasetTypeEnum.title: DatasetTypeEnum
DatasetTypeEnum.description: Dataset types — mirrors DatasetType enum values.

opts.title: Opts
opts.description: Optional format-specific options (passed through to the sink)

ExportRequest.title: ExportRequest
ExportRequest.description:
Request body for ``POST /export/{format}``.

``flow`` is the raw ``DataikuFlow.to_dict()`` payload (round-trippable via
``DataikuFlow.from_dict``).  ``opts`` is a free-form dict reserved for
format-specific knobs (e.g. ``{"scale": 2.0}`` for PNG).

id.title: Id
id.description: Recipe name used as the node id

recipe_type_a.title: Recipe Type A
recipe_type_a.description: Recipe type in flow A (None when added in B)

recipe_type_b.title: Recipe Type B
recipe_type_b.description: Recipe type in flow B (None when removed from B)

diff.title: Diff
diff.description: When kind=changed: which fields differ ({field: {a, b}}).

NodeDiff.title: NodeDiff
NodeDiff.description:
A single per-node difference entry.

For ``added`` and ``removed`` entries ``diff`` is None. For ``changed`` entries
``diff`` enumerates which fields differ between A and B.

PivotSettingsModel.title: PivotSettingsModel
PivotSettingsModel.description: Mirrors PivotSettings.to_dict(): rowColumns, columnColumn, valueColumn, aggregation.

PrepareStepModel.title: PrepareStepModel
PrepareStepModel.description:
Mirrors PrepareStep.to_dict() output.

Fields: metaType, type (processor DSS string), disabled, params, name.

ProcessorCatalogEntry.title: ProcessorCatalogEntry
ProcessorCatalogEntry.description: A single entry in the processor catalog (from ProcessorCatalog.get_processor).

ProcessorTypeEnum.title: ProcessorTypeEnum
ProcessorTypeEnum.description: All 122 unique ProcessorType values from py2dataiku.

pandas_examples.title: Pandas Examples
pandas_examples.description: pandas patterns that map to this recipe

RecipeCatalogEntry.title: RecipeCatalogEntry
RecipeCatalogEntry.description: A single entry in the recipe catalog.
